## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content strategy, implementation of GPTs, and potential new article series for Exec's learn center.](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Plan to create new article series with embedded GPTs, focusing on high-conversion keywords and SEO-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Implement strategic CTAs in sidebars and content to drive core business value and capture emails](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of embedding quick roleplays within articles to showcase Exec's platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and GPT Implementation

  - [Current articles to be categorized into relevant series (e.g., team performance, learning and development)](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [New GPT-focused articles to be created around high-value, conversion-oriented keywords](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Aim to add value to existing content with GPTs and create new, GPT-centric pages](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Consider implementing email capture for GPT responses (e.g., blurring content, requiring email input)](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### CTA Optimization

  - [Utilize sidebar CTAs and in-content callout cards for contextual promotion](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Create specific CTAs for different audience segments (e.g., sales, HR, executives)](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Drive users to core business value pages (e.g., roleplay marketing page) rather than just learn pages](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Roleplay Use Cases

  - [Sales: New rep onboarding, product expansion, discovery calls, value prop delivery, objection handling](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [HR: Feedback, change communication, coaching conversations, expectation setting, terminations](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Executive: Briefing conversations, impactful information delivery](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Customer-facing roles: Handling difficult customers, de-escalation techniques](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Future Content Enhancements

  - [Explore embedding quick roleplays within articles (30-second taste with option to continue)](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Consider implementing phone-based AI interactions for relevant blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Conduct keyword research focusing on high-conversion, GPT-relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Develop a list of potential new article series and categories](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Review existing content for GPT integration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Create contextual CTAs for different audience segments and content types](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Explore technical implementation of embedded roleplays in articles](https://fathom.video/share/CjdtvUthBEk3Fa_Sj-pnn7ptFTEHDnxP?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
